curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff which adds max:500 validation rules to shipping address fields in shippingMethodSave. The sibling ContactInformationTrait.php already had max:500 validation at the pre-patch commit, so it is not vulnerable. PaymentTrait.php handles payment gateway selection and does not process free-text address fields, so it is not a sibling. Kept pre-assigned integer-overflow class consistent with CWE-190 and the advisory description.
